parameters.query:
SELECT
  (ml.canonical_name IS NOT NULL AND ml.canonical_name != '') AS found,
  v.input_slug,
  ml.canonical_name,
  ml.slug AS mfr_slug,
  COALESCE(
    (
      SELECT json_agg(
        json_build_object(
          'slug', ed.slug,
          'name', ed.name,
          'entity_type', ed.entity_type,
          'category', ed.category
        )
        ORDER BY ed.entity_type, ed.name
      )
      FROM entity_display ed
      WHERE ed.manufacturer = ml.canonical_name
    ),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS products
FROM (VALUES ($1::text)) AS v(input_slug)
LEFT JOIN manufacturer_lookup ml ON ml.slug = v.input_slug
